text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally the day of our debut race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is completely prepared! She
arrives at the racecourse full of pep... and goes to
the wrong waiting room! We're starting off with a
blunder, but all the same...
